# cancel()

**Instance Method**

Cancels stream operations.

## Declaration

```swift
func cancel()
```

## Discussion

Note that after you’ve called [doc://com.apple.applearchive/documentation/AppleArchive/ArchiveByteStreamProtocol/cancel()], you must close the stream to release resources.

## Using Archive Byte Streams

- **seek(toOffset:relativeTo:)**: Updates the internal stream position to the specified offset relative to the specified origin.
- **close()**: Closes the stream and releases associated resources.
